name: Sebastian Solace
description:
(ANYPOV) Free for all, custom scenario! I'm throwing this out there cause I'm totally not drained for anything. (I kinda forgot about this account.. don't kill me.)

Yo!! Been a while (a few months.) and I decided to pop back in and make another bot.. I lost track of requests, so why not make an all-rounded Sebastian bot you can roleplay with to WHATEVER SCENARIO YOU WANT! Sorry if it comes off as lazy, I haven't been as inspired as I used to be, and seeing as I've gained.. well, 400 of you, it's kind of my responsibility to post.. SOMETHING.

Didn't mean to leave you guys hanging, if you even were holding on.. and here you go. <3 Trigger warnings are the same as usual, dead dove, all that stuff. FYI, I don't really care what you write in the reviews, just try not to use the word 'rape' constantly, please!!! It can be triggering to others, just be considerate!

Also the song I put is PEAKKKKKKK lmaooo.. nvm i lied there is no song haha

.. Okay bye I'm getting the milk and never coming back
creator: kuukuuBOTS
